raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Violent crime in California increased by 6% in one year.",
    "High-profile property crimes are affecting people's sense of safety in California.",
    "Proposals were announced to increase penalties for serial shoplifters.",
    "There is a proposal to increase information sharing between state and local law enforcement to reduce the presence of illegal guns.",
    "There is a proposal to restrict judges from dismissing firearms enhancements.",
    "The legislation aims to restore '10-20-Life' enhancements for violent felonies committed with guns.",
    "The legislation proposes to bring transparency to the good conduct credit program for state prisoners.",
    "Victims will have a voice at court proceedings as proposed in the new legislation.",
    "The legislation aims to improve domestic violence survivors' awareness of resources and services to help them recover."
  ]
}
```
